title: Horse Guard
description: Horse guard helps protect the horses on your server while giving you the ability to trust other players to ride them!
body:
[![License: GPL](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-GPL-blue.svg)](LICENSE)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/628396916639793152.svg?color=%237289da&label=discord)](https://shantek.co/discord)
[![CodeFactor](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/shantek/horseguard/badge)](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/shantek/horseguard)


# 🐴 Horse Guard

**The ultimate horse protection plugin for Minecraft SMP servers.**  
Automatically protects tamed horses from unwanted interaction, while allowing you to trust others or transfer ownership with simple commands or a GUI.

---

🎥 **Quick Demo:**  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DfKzi22by08" title="Horse Guard Plugin" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 🔐 Key Features

- 🐎 Automatically protects any horse you tame
- 👥 Allows trusted players to ride and lead (but not harm) your horse
- 🔁 Transfer horse ownership to another player at any time
- 🌍 Disable horse protection in specific worlds via config
- 🧭 Easy-to-use in-game GUI with `/horse`

> 💡 Perfect for survival, RPG, and roleplay servers

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the plugin and drop it into your `/plugins` folder.
2. Restart your Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, or Purpur server.
3. You're good to go! Horses are protected automatically once tamed.

---

## 🛠️ Commands

> All commands must be used while **sitting on the horse** you own.

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/horse` | Opens the in-game GUI to manage trust and ownership |
| `/horse trustlist` | Shows all players trusted for the horse you're riding |
| `/horse trust <player>` | Grants ride/lead access to a player |
| `/horse untrust <player>` | Revokes trust from a player |
| `/horse transfer <player>` | Transfers ownership to another player |
| `/horse reload` | Reloads the plugin configuration (admin only) |

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Node | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `shantek.horseguard.ride` | Allows riding/leading **any** horse regardless of ownership |
| `shantek.horseguard.damage` | Allows damaging **any** horse, ignoring protection |
| `shantek.horseguard.reload` | Allows reloading the plugin config |

---
